mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_CODE ( CODECD, PAR_CODECD, CODENM, ORD, TEXTVAL, NUMVAL, USEYN, SYS_CONST, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{CODECD}, #{PAR_CODECD}, #{CODENM}, #{ORD}, #{TEXTVAL}, #{NUMVAL}, #{USEYN}, #{SYS_CONST}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_CODE SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE CODECD = #{CODECD}
